summary: 5 film announcements, 4 TV announcements across 5 trades.

film.title: How To Rob A Bank
film.talent: Nicholas Hoult, Zoë Kravitz, Pete Davidson
film.announcement: Action film starring Nicholas Hoult, Zoë Kravitz, and Pete Davidson has been scheduled to move to a November release date.

film.title: Margaret Wise Brown
film.talent: Elle Fanning, Julianne Moore; Director: Rebecca Miller
film.announcement: Rebecca Miller directing new film about 'Goodnight Moon' author Margaret Wise Brown, starring Elle Fanning and Julianne Moore.

film.title: Freddy the 13th
film.announcement: Dan Trachtenberg's untitled 'Freddy the 13th' animated horror comedy has received a release date.

film.title: The Country
film.talent: Jodie Whittaker; Director: Ella Grace Kennedy
film.announcement: Jodie Whittaker to star in and executive produce dystopian short film 'The Country' directed by Ella Grace Kennedy.

film.title: Who Is Ernie Barnes?
film.announcement: Filmmakers Chike Ozah and Coodie Simmons announce documentary and immersive experience about artist Ernie Barnes.

tv.title: House of David
tv.announcement: Series renewed for Season 3 by Prime Video.

tv.title: Kid Sister
tv.announcement: New Zealand comedy 'Kid Sister' from Simone Nathan lands at ChaiFlicks in deal with Seven.One Studios International.

tv.title: Hooligans
tv.announcement: Keanu Reeves motorcycle racing series 'Hooligans' debuts as Samsung TV Plus revs up live programming.

tv.title: American Horror Story
tv.announcement: Ariana Grande exits 'American Horror Story' Season 13 amid her 'Eternal Sunshine' concert tour.
